description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with two offset, cantilevered stories, each with rounded corners and clean white facades. The upper floor includes a rooftop terrace with a minimalist railing and an open stairway leading up from the lower level. Large glass panels and open spaces are visible, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor connectivity. The structure is supported by slender columns and sits on a broad, flat platform that mimics a wooden deck. The lower level has a partially recessed entryway and a sheltered area beneath the overhanging upper floor. The overall aesthetic is sleek, geometric, and contemporary, with a focus on open, functional living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with cantilevered, rounded white facades, large glass panels, and a rooftop terrace. The design is sleek and geometric, emphasizing open spaces and natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the offset upper story, open stairway, and recessed entry beneath the cantilevered section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked, rounded stories and the rooftop terrace with railing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open stairway to the rooftop and the geometric alignment of the stories.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with clear visibility of the main entryway, steps, and the overhanging upper floor.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, minimal overhang, and no porch; clean, geometric lines
